examples: If you crave chocolate, try a carob bar instead.
In my experience a straight substitution of carob for chocolate doesn't work.
Carob extract added as a light barrier.
The Talmud recounts the story of Honi, the miracle worker, who saw a man planting a carob tree.
The actual vineyard is located in the Yatir Forest underneath the Judean hills, the biggest planted forest in Israel, where you will find carob, pistachio and pine trees.
